disambiguation_rules.appropriate_congressional_committees: Refers to: Committee on Homeland Security, Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence, Committee on Energy and Commerce of House of Representatives; and Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs, Select Committee on Intelligence, Committee on Commerce Science and Transportation of Senate

oddities.note: This is the enacting clause and title section only. The substantive content requiring entity extraction (annual assessments, coordination requirements, specific agency tasks) appears in sections not provided in this excerpt.
